source.section: 4 - AN/ASQ-228 ATFLIR Targeting Pod > 4.5 - Pointing Methods > 4.5.4 - Waypoint Slaved

steps.action: Select FLIR page and press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the selected DDI.
The Select Focus Diamond indicates what display is selected.
On HSI (Horizontal Situation Indicator) page, select desired waypoint using the OSBs (Option Select Button) next to UP or DOWN arrows.
Press OSB next to WYPT (boxed = selected)
Press on OSB next to WPSDG to designate waypoint as the target point (boxed = selected)
Targeting point will automatically slew to the selected waypoint.
Use the TDC (Throttle Designator Controller) Aft/Fwd/Left/Right controls to slew the targeting pod reticle over the desired target if adjustments are required.
